title: Crispy Roasted Coconut Oats Donabe
description: A roasted, chewy, and flavorful Jamaican-inspired dish featuring porridge oats, perfect for a vegan-friendly brunch.
instructions: Combine porridge oats and coconut milk in a donabe and stir to combine.
Cook on medium heat for 2 minutes, or until the oats are slightly toasted.
Add coconut oil, maple syrup, cinnamon, nutmeg, and vanilla extract to the donabe and stir to combine.
Continue cooking for an additional 2 minutes, or until the oats are creamy and well coated in the spice mixture.
Transfer the donabe to the oven and roast for 20-25 minutes, or until the top is crispy and golden brown.
Remove the donabe from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes.
Use a spoon to create a well in the center of the oats and carefully add a small amount of water to the well.
Spherify the oats by stirring the mixture quickly with a spoon.
Serve the Crispy Roasted Coconut Oats Donabe warm, garnished with toasted coconut flakes if desired.
To toast coconut flakes, simply spread them on a baking sheet and bake in a 350F oven for 2-3 minutes, or until lightly browned.
